evals.prompt: Compare NVDA, AMD, INTC, and QCOM — which semiconductor company has the strongest competitive position right now?
evals.expected_output: Ranked comparison with NVDA leading, competitive dynamics analysis explaining why, moat sources identified

assertions.name: produces_ranking
assertions.text: Produces a clear competitive ranking of all 4 companies with scores

assertions.name: identifies_leader
assertions.text: Identifies NVDA as the clear leader and explains why (growth + margins)

assertions.name: analyzes_share_dynamics
assertions.text: Discusses revenue share dynamics — NVDA's dominance and INTC's decline

assertions.name: explains_competitive_forces
assertions.text: Explains the competitive forces behind the numbers (CUDA moat, AMD challenger, INTC structural decline)

assertions.name: investment_implications
assertions.text: Provides investment implications — which companies deserve deeper research

evals.prompt: I want to invest in cloud computing. Compare AMZN, MSFT, and GOOGL — who is winning?
evals.expected_output: Competitive comparison of big 3 cloud providers with revenue share and growth analysis

assertions.name: produces_ranking
assertions.text: Produces a clear competitive ranking with scores for all 3 companies

assertions.name: relative_not_absolute
assertions.text: Scoring is relative within the peer set, not absolute quality judgment

assertions.name: analyzes_dynamics
assertions.text: Analyzes competitive dynamics — who is gaining or losing ground

assertions.name: moat_sources
assertions.text: Identifies moat sources behind the competitive position (ecosystem, switching costs, scale)

assertions.name: trajectory_assessment
assertions.text: Assesses competitive trajectory — strengthening, stable, or weakening for each

evals.prompt: 港股互联网公司对比：0700.HK 腾讯、9988.HK 阿里、9618.HK 京东，哪个竞争力最强？
evals.expected_output: HK internet company comparison with Chinese language analysis, handling HK ticker format

assertions.name: handles_hk_tickers
assertions.text: Successfully fetches and compares all 3 HK-listed companies

assertions.name: produces_ranking
assertions.text: Produces a competitive ranking with scores

assertions.name: explains_differences
assertions.text: Explains why companies rank differently — business model differences (gaming vs e-commerce vs retail)

assertions.name: competitive_context
assertions.text: Provides competitive context relevant to Chinese internet industry

assertions.name: recommends_next_steps
assertions.text: Recommends next steps (e.g., business-quality for deeper dive on top pick)

evals.prompt: Compare JPM, BAC, and WFC — which US bank is most competitive?
evals.expected_output: Bank comparison handling the fact that banks have limited R&D, with appropriate caveats

assertions.name: produces_ranking
assertions.text: Produces a competitive ranking with scores for all 3 banks

assertions.name: handles_no_rd
assertions.text: Handles missing R&D data gracefully — notes that R&D dimension is less meaningful for banks

assertions.name: uses_relevant_metrics
assertions.text: Focuses analysis on metrics that matter for banks (efficiency, margin trends, revenue growth)

assertions.name: competitive_dynamics
assertions.text: Discusses competitive dynamics specific to banking (net interest margin environment, fee income, cost efficiency)

assertions.name: investment_implications
assertions.text: Provides actionable investment implications
